title: Mohrodendron tetraptera
taxonomy: Mohrodendron tetraptera is a genus in the family Chloranthaceae, an order of flowering plants. It belongs to the division Magnoliophyta, which consists of all flowering plants. This division is further classified into a class of flowering plants called Magnoliopsida. The class Magnoliopsida is a part of the larger group known as Angiosperms, which is a part of the kingdom Plantae. The kingdom Plantae is a subset of the broader domain Eukaryota, which includes all eukaryotic organisms.

intro: There is no information available about the plant "Mohrodendron tetraptera."
